item.title: Trying Food in New York
item.description: Ken and Carol sample classic New York foods during a relaxed city visit, highlighting local flavors and memorable travel moments.

media:content.media:title: Trying Food in New York

item.title: First Taste of French Street Food
item.description: Ken and Carol try French street food for the first time and share a relaxed food travel moment from France.

media:content.media:title: First Taste of French Street Food
media:content.media:description: Ken and Carol try French street food for the first time and share a relaxed food travel moment from France.

item.title: Half-Pound Burger at a Local Eatery
item.description: Ken and Carol enjoy a half-pound burger at a local eatery, sharing a simple food stop from their travel adventures.

media:content.media:description: Ken and Carol enjoy a half-pound burger at a local eatery, sharing a simple food stop from their travel adventures.

item.title: Trying Pizza Pizza’s New Chicken Sandwiches
item.description: Ken and Carol try Pizza Pizza’s three new chicken sandwiches and share a simple food stop from their travels.

item.title: Domino's Pizza & Philly Cheese Steak Stuffed Bread
item.description: A taste test of Domino’s Philly Cheesesteak Stuffed Bread, exploring its flavor, texture, and overall dining experience.
